msg_description: Possible BIOS attack - Device detected and recovered from a corrupted/tampered version of BIOS.
msg_action: No action is required. The printer automatically restarts and arrives at a _Ready_ state.

msg_description: Possible BIOS attack - newly downloaded firmware fails to cryptographically validate the BIOS code.
msg_action: No action is required. The printer automatically restarts and arrives at a _Ready_ state.

msg_description: A downgrade was attempted to firmware that doesn_t include the SureStart feature from the Ready screen.
msg_action: Downgrade the firmware from the Preboot menu using a USB flash drive. Contact HP Support. NOTE: Downgrading firmware can result in losing security features

msg_description: A downgrade was attempted to firmware that doesn_t include the SureStart feature from the Ready screen.
msg_action: Downgrade the firmware from the Preboot menu using a USB flash drive. Contact HP Support. NOTE: Downgrading firmware can result in losing security features

msg_description: integrity check of executable firmware code performed during system initialization, failed
msg_action: Partial clean required, contact HP Support

msg_description: Potential run-time intrusion is detected. Machine was attacked at memory level
msg_action: No action is required. NOTE: If this error displays frequently in the Event Log Page, a network intrusion might be present. Contact the network security

msg: Intrusion detection disabled. Unable to scan for memory corruption.
msg_description: Intrusion detection feature is disabled. Device is running without run-time memory protection.
msg_action: Restart machine. NOTE: If this error displays frequently in the Event Log Page, a network intrusion might be present. Contact the network security

msg_description: Initialization of the intrusion detection functionality failed during boot up. Device is running without run-time memory protection feature
msg_action: No action is required. NOTE: If this error displays frequently in the Event Log Page, a network intrusion might be present. Contact the network security
